changes: Guard: Effect duration reduced from 5 to 4 seconds.
Guard: Movement speed reduction decreased from 50% to 33%.
Holy Spirit: Healing potency reduced from 8,000 to 6,000.
Intervene: Recast time increased from 12 to 15 seconds.
Wind's Reply: Additional damage from Pressure Point effect increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Meteodrive: Range increased from 15 to 20 yalms.
Fuma Shuriken: Recast time reduced from 12 to 10 seconds.
Dokumori: Recast time increased from 20 to 24 seconds.
Dokumori: Effect duration reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Bunshin: Additional damage for Forked/Fleeting Raiju reduced from 4,000 to 2,000.
Bunshin: Additional damage no longer ignores Guard when using Assassinate.
Doton: Damage reduction reduced from 20% to 15%.
Seiton Tenchu: Now ignores Guard effects when dealing damage.
HP reduced from 63,000 to 61,500.
Zanshin: Potency increased from 5,000 to 6,000.
HP increased from 60,000 to 61,500.
World-swallower: Movement speed increased from 25% to 50%.
Ouroboros: Damage converted to HP increased from 50% to 100%.
Powerful Shot: Reduction to Harmonic Arrow recast time increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Pitch Perfect: Reduction to Harmonic Arrow recast time increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Harmonic Arrow: Recast time reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Blast Charge: Heat stacks required for Overheated reduced from 5 to 4.
Saber Dance: Potency changed to 12,000 for first target and 8,000 for remaining when striking multiple.
Dance of the Dawn: Potency changed to 15,000 for first target and 10,000 for remaining when striking multiple.
Lethargy: Target damage dealt reduction increased from 25% to 33%.
Lethargy: Damage reduction duration increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Lethargy: Heavy duration reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Lethargy: Recast time reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Holy in White: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Smudge: Recast time reduced from 16 to 12 seconds.
Tempera Grassa: Barrier potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Tempera Coat: Recast time no longer reduced when barrier is absorbed.

new_content.name: AAC Light-heavyweight Tier (Savage) Adjustments
new_content.description: Weekly restriction removed, treasure coffers now always appear, and direct access to areas enabled.
